name: QR Code
description: Decode QR codes from images and extract embedded data (URLs, text, etc.). No authentication required — pure code integration using OpenCV.

integration_id_config.description: Unique identifier for this integration instance

actions.name: Health Check
actions.description: Verify that the OpenCV QR code decoder is operational

actions.name: Decode QR Code
actions.description: Decode a QR code from a base64-encoded image and return the embedded data

image_data.description: Base64-encoded image (PNG, JPEG, etc.) containing the QR code
